localizations.title: Schrödinger's Cat
localizations.hint_0: There is something you can retrieve on this card.
localizations.hint_8: This cat is a combination of two versions of Schrödinger's cat.
localizations.hint_10: Part of the symbol in the top-right corner, which you can use to combine the cats, is missing.
localizations.hint_15: This unique dead-dead version of Schrödinger's cat can be combined with another cat.
localizations.hint_16: This extra positive cat can be combined with a negative cat.
localizations.hint_20: This unique alive-alive version of Schrödinger's cat can be combined with another cat.
localizations.hint_20_after_39: This negative matter cat can be combined with a positive cat.
localizations.hint_23: Schrödinger's cat popped out of the box with another version of Schrödinger's cat. Now there are two of them! What can you do with these two cats?
localizations.hint_25: Part of the symbol in the top-right corner, which you can use to combine the cats, is missing.
localizations.hint_27_first: This black cat can be combined with a white cat.
localizations.hint_27: Pay close attention to the underlined words on one of the notes (N) and the backs of your cards.
localizations.hint_32: Schrödinger's cat popped out of the box with another version of Schrödinger's cat. Now there are two of them! What can you do with these two cats?
localizations.hint_36_first: This white cat can be combined with a black cat.
localizations.hint_36: Pay close attention to the underlined words on one of the notes (N) and the backs of your cards.
localizations.hint_39: You must find the cat hidden inside one of these portals.
localizations.hint_42: This red cat came into your reality with another cat of a different color. What should you do?
localizations.hint_61: Take your device and angle it correctly to make a cat appear by lining up the pieces.
localizations.hint_69: Find the correct color of Schrödinger's actual cat. Be careful; it's not the same as the cat shown on the game box.
localizations.hint_88: This card shows two puzzle pieces combined; one blue and one red.
localizations.hint_108: This blue cat came into your reality with another cat of a different color. What should you do?
localizations.hint_250: This unstable cat is missing half of it's body. Find the other half.
localizations.answer_hint_0: Remove the perforated piece and place the card over the cat on card L. When the +60 is visible through the hole, you will see 600.
localizations.answer_hint_4: Try putting a cat inside the box!
localizations.answer_hint_8: The 8 in the top corner is duplicated. It makes number 88.
localizations.answer_hint_10: Look closely at the symbol in the top-right corner. Along with card 25, the combined symbol is the multiplication symbol. You must multiply the values of this cat (10) and the other cat (25). 10 x 25 = 250
localizations.answer_hint_15: You must combine this cat (15) with its other half (20), then put them both into the box (4). 15 + 20 + 4 = 39
localizations.answer_hint_16: You must combine this positive cat (16) with the negative cat (20); the negative cat's value is -20. 16 + -20 = -4
localizations.answer_hint_20: You must combine this cat (20) with its other half (15), then put them both into the box (4). 20 + 15 + 4 = 39
localizations.answer_hint_20_after_39: You must combine this negative cat (20) with the positive cat (16); the negative cat's value is -20. -20 + 16 = -4
localizations.answer_hint_23: You must place the DEAD cat (23) into the box (4). 23 + 4 = 27. Be sure to look closely at the numbers of ALL the cards in the deck.
localizations.answer_hint_25: Look closely at the symbol in the top-right corner. Along with card 10, the combined symbol is the multiplication symbol. You must multiply the values of this cat (25) and the other cat (10). 25 x 10 = 250
localizations.answer_hint_32: You must place the ALIVE cat (32) into the box (4). 32 + 4 = 36. Be sure to look closely at the numbers of ALL the cards in the deck.
localizations.answer_hint_42: You must combine this red cat (42) with the blue cat (108) by combining their colors to get a purple cat. Look at the backs of your cards. One of them has a purple cat.
localizations.answer_hint_61: Slightly angle your device to the left until a cat appears.
localizations.answer_hint_69: The correct color combination of Mr. Schrödinger's cat is: Primary coat: dark gray; highlights: light gray; eyes: green; ears: pink.
localizations.answer_hint_88: Add the card's red 8 and blue 8 together to merge the two realities together.
localizations.answer_hint_108: You must combine this blue cat (108) with the red cat (42) by combining their colors to get a purple cat. Look at the backs of your cards. One of them has a purple cat.
localizations.answer_hint_250: Combine this half of the unstable cat with the cat on the purple card to complete it. By placing the two cards side-by-side, you will see the cat with a break running down the middle. If you look at the backs of your cards, one of them shows a shattered cat head.
localizations.machine_39: Is this the one you are looking for?
localizations.button_machine_warning: Did you carefully read Schrödinger's notes (N)?
localizations.machine_69_instructions: You grabbed a cat from the past, but you aren't sure if you got the right one. What did Schrödinger's cat look like? You can change the color of the ears, eyes, primary coat, and highlights to recreate the correct one.
localizations.machine_69_end: Mr. Schrödinger recognizes his cat. All's well that ends well! But this adventure has you a bit shaken up, and you don't know if you'll be offering to watch over his pet again anytime soon.
